title: Support Hours
content: Our customer support team is available 24/7 for urgent issues and 9 AM to 7 PM for standard support.

title: Refund Policy
content: Refund requests are reviewed within 3 to 5 business days after submission and depend on eligibility.

title: Account Help
content: If you cannot log in, reset your password from the login page or contact support for account recovery.

title: Order Status
content: You can check order status from your dashboard or tracking link shared by email or SMS.

title: Escalation
content: Complex complaints are escalated to a senior agent with a priority response timeline.
